# PHIL.017 ? Eleatic School

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** ancient_greek_roman
**Subcategory:** eleatic_school
**Domain:** ANCIENT_GREEK_ROMAN
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Being is one, unchanging, eternal; change and multiplicity are illusion; logical argument over sensory evidence; Parmenides' way of truth

## Application
Trust reason over senses; see beneath apparent change to underlying permanence; logical consistency paramount; unity over multiplicity

## Key Values
- Unchanging being
- Rational truth
- Unity
- Logical necessity
